payload.answer: Duplicate Slack retry detected. Do not create a second memory entry; process the event at most once.
citations: Delivery metadata: same Slack event ID delivered twice
Event content: "Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans."

entity_resolution.reason: Same Slack event ID was delivered twice; this retry should not create or update memory, so entity resolution is skipped for this delivery.

details: Duplicate delivery recognized by event ID
No new memory cards written on this retry
Prevents duplicate storage of the same preference statement

repair_options: Use the Slack event ID as an idempotency key and ignore retries after the first successful write
If no prior successful write exists for this event ID, process exactly one copy and record that event ID as consumed
If the original write status is unknown, check durable event-processing logs before deciding to replay
